items.title: May 29, 2000: Postgame interview with Larry Johnson and Charlie Ward of the Knicks, who tied the Eastern Conference Finals at 2-2 with a 91-89 win over the Indiana Pacers.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 29, 2000: Postgame interview with Larry Johnson and Charlie Ward of the Knicks, who tied the Eastern Conference Finals at 2-2 with a 91-89 win over the Indiana Pacers.

Johnson finished with 25 PTS (10-16 FG/5-5 3P)/7 REB and Ward had 16 PTS (4-6 3P)/7 AST/3 STL for New York.

items.title: When I got into sportswriting, places I considered dream/destination jobs back when I left college are either gone completely or a shell of what they used to be. I don’t know what to tell journalism students/interns who want to make a career in this field about where they should

items.title: Breaking: The Philadelphia 76ers are hiring Mike Gansey as president, sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. Gansey was most recently general manager of the Cleveland Cavaliers. He began working for the Cavs in 2012 and rose through the ranks, including winning G League Exe

items.body_excerpt: Breaking: The Philadelphia 76ers are hiring Mike Gansey as president, sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. Gansey was most recently general manager of the Cleveland Cavaliers. He began working for the Cavs in 2012 and rose through the ranks, including winning G League Executive of the Year.

items.title: OKC's best plus-minus in the Conference Finals isn't MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (who is -28 for the series) or Chet Holmgren—it's Alex Caruso, at +38.
items.author: Basketball Reference
items.body_excerpt:
OKC's best plus-minus in the Conference Finals isn't MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (who is -28 for the series) or Chet Holmgren—it's Alex Caruso, at +38.

In the plus-minus section of Thursday's box score, you can see how Caruso was on the floor for the only stretch where Wemby shows up with red.

items.title: May 29, 1990: Portland's Jerome Kersey to Clyde Drexler for a fast break slam late in Game 5 of the WCF against Phoenix.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 29, 1990: Portland's Jerome Kersey to Clyde Drexler for a fast break slam late in Game 5 of the WCF against Phoenix.

Drexler finished with 32 PTS/10 REB/3 STL and Kersey had 21 PTS/11 REB in the Trail Blazers' 120-114 win, which gave them a 3-2 series lead on the Suns.

items.title: In his first year as a head coach at any level, Tyler Lashbrook became the first coach in Maine Celtics history to win Coach of the Month.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
In his first year as a head coach at any level, Tyler Lashbrook became the first coach in Maine Celtics history to win Coach of the Month.

He then returned to Boston as an assistant, where his work included a crucial role in Hugo Gonzalez's development.

Now, Lashbrook is...1/2

items.title: Dallas Wings CEO Greg Bibb confirmed to ESPN that following a host of delays & complications, construction began earlier this month on the team's new practice facility in West Oak Cliff.
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
Dallas Wings CEO Greg Bibb confirmed to ESPN that following a host of delays & complications, construction began earlier this month on the team's new practice facility in West Oak Cliff.

Barring any significant weather issues, the facility is expected to be completed by training camp in April 2027
